reference: These objective two-dimensional echocardiogram findings must be correlated with symptoms and physical examinations. If you are not experiencing any symptoms and your physical examination is normal, then these two-dimensional echocardiogram findings are insignificant or essentially normal findings.
text: These objective two-dimensional echocardiogram findings must be correlated with symptoms and physical examinations. If you are not experiencing any symptoms and your physical examination is normal, then these two-dimensional echocardiogram findings are insignificant or essentially normal findings.
